description.value:
Frequency once per day

Using readily available materials, you create pieces of art to inspire those who have inspired you. Choose an ally. You spend 1 hour to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Craft] a gift of negligible Bulk or larger with the consumable and primal traits, decorated with the talphis' signature glowing paint. As long as the chosen ally wears this gift, they can draw inspiration from it as an Interact action to gain a +1 status bonus to their next attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check until the start of their next turn and gain temporary Hit Points equal to your Charisma modifier + character level that last for 1 minute. The glow from your gift fades after 24 hours as it crumbles to dust.

Special If you're legendary in Crafting, you can make up to five tokens per day, but each must be made for a different ally.
